defenses: Provide proof of valid registration at the time of the citation to qualify for $5 dismissal
Demonstrate registration was renewed before the citation was issued
Show DMV processing delay caused the apparent lapse in registration
Provide receipt or transaction record showing meter was paid for the cited period to qualify for $5 dismissal
Document that the meter was malfunctioning or out of service at the time
Show that the pay station was inoperable and no alternative was available
Show that no parking signs were missing, obscured, or improperly posted
Demonstrate the vehicle was not in the no parking zone
Prove the zone designation was unclear or ambiguous
Prove the fire lane markings were faded, missing, or not clearly visible
Show the vehicle was not blocking fire lane access
Demonstrate a genuine emergency required the temporary stop
Provide valid disabled parking permit or license plate documentation in effect at the time
Show the permit was properly displayed but overlooked by the officer
Demonstrate the space was not properly marked as a handicap zone
Show that restriction signage was absent, hidden, or ambiguous
Demonstrate authorization or permit to park in the restricted area
Prove the vehicle was not in the restricted zone at the cited time
Provide evidence the vehicle arrived within the allowed time period
Show that the time limit signage was unclear or missing
Demonstrate a documented emergency required staying beyond the time limit
Prove the vehicle was not on the sidewalk or grass at the time of citation
Show the area was not clearly designated as off-limits for parking
Demonstrate a temporary emergency required the vehicle's placement
Show that the vehicle was properly parked at a legal location
Demonstrate a brief stop was necessitated by an emergency
Prove the citation location description does not match the vehicle's actual position
